channel.title: Rank Modeling on Øystein Sørensen
channel.description: Recent content in Rank Modeling on Øystein Sørensen

item.title: Probabilistic preference learning with the Mallows rank model
item.description: This paper studies the analysis of rank and preference data. We consider both complete rankings, partial rankings, and pairwise preferences. We develop a complete Bayesian framework for estimating Mallows’ rank model in all this cases, including clustering of users with similar preferences and preference prediction. Published in Journal of Machine Learning Research. Joint first authorship with Valeria Vitelli.
